prompt:

FINAL: NYK 107, SAS 106
NBA FINALS SERIES: NYK leads 3-1

Q3: SAS 14 - NYK 26 (End Q3: SAS 90-75, SAS up 15)

NYK: OG Anunoby - 33 pts, 4 reb, 1 ast

SAS stole Game 3 on the road to cut the deficit to 2-1. SAS came out with historic first-half intensity in Game 4. NYK staged the comeback, outscoring SAS 32-16 in Q4. SAS now faces elimination in Game 5 in San Antonio.

TONE: Lead with the comeback. The Spurs blew a 27-point halftime lead in the NBA Finals. That is the story.
